The user wants a plain text record with three key=value lines. The fields: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. The order: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. The user provided values: route_verdict=CONTINUE, repair_target=resolve prior blocker ids before ALLOW: ART-001-BLK-8FE3D326, blocked_move=do not silently drop source-grounded blockers. So output exactly three lines:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=resolve prior blocker ids before ALLOW: ART-001-BLK-8FE3D326
blocked_move=do not silently drop source-grounded blockers

No extra headings, JSON, markdown, or extra lines.

Thus answer: those three lines.
</think>

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=resolve prior blocker ids before ALLOW: ART-001-BLK-8FE3D326
blocked_move=do not silently drop source-grounded blockers
